name: Gami Discord Recruitment
description: Browser-based Discord DM handler for Gami gaming platform. Monitors Discord web via Chrome CDP — no bot token required. Supports multiple bots running in parallel, each on its own OpenClaw node.

maxDmTurns.description: Global default: max AI turns per DM conversation before human takeover. Default: 5

takeoverMessage.description: Global default: message sent to user on handover.

pollIntervalMs.description: How often (ms) to poll Discord for new DMs. Applied to all bots. Default: 5000

cdpHost.description: Global default CDP host (single-bot / fallback mode). Default: 127.0.0.1

cdpPort.description: Global default CDP port (single-bot / fallback mode). Default: 18800

llmBaseUrl.description: Global default LLM base URL. Default: http://192.168.8.201:8080/v1

llmModel.description: Global default LLM model name. Default: default

systemPrompt.description: Global default system prompt for DM conversations.

bots.description: Multi-bot definitions. If omitted, runs in single-bot mode using the global fields above.

id.description: Unique bot identifier used in tool calls and logs.

label.description: Human-readable bot name shown in logs.

cdpHost.description: IP or hostname of the OpenClaw node running this bot's browser. Use 127.0.0.1 for local.

cdpPort.description: Chrome CDP port on the node. Default: 18800

maxDmTurns.description: Per-bot override: max AI turns before human takeover.

systemPrompt.description: Per-bot override: system prompt for DM conversations.
